name: OZOP ENERGY SOLUTIONS, INC.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business ORGANIZATION Ozop Energy Solutions, Inc. (the Company, we, us or our) was originally incorporated as Newmarkt Corp. on July 17, 2015, under the laws of the State of Nevada. Our corporate website is located at http://ozopenergy.com/, and the contents of our website are expressly not incorporated herein. On July 10, 2020, the Company entered into a Stock Purchase Agreement (the SPA) with Power Conversion Technologies, Inc., a Pennsylvania corporation (PCTI), ...
